rulings.Case Title: TRACEY THOMPSON VS. JOHN STEWART CO. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 12, 2020 line 1. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY'S Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint is DENIED. Trial is set for January 19, 2021. It appears, based on the record, that this case will reach a 5-year mark on February 24, 2021. The delay in bringing this cross-complaint is prejudicial to the co-defendant. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: HC 650 SACRAMENTO LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. STARCITY PROPERTIES INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 12, 2020 line 2. PLAINTIFF HC 650 SACRAMENTO LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is continued to December 8, 2020 on Court's own motion. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CHERYL OKA ET AL VS. BRICK AND TIMBER, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November12, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT AGPM 520 GEARY LP'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is GRANTED with leave to amend to allege facts supporting malice, oppression or fraud re: moving defendant. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: FENGE WONG VS. GUICHAN WU ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Jul 24, 2020 line 4. DEFENDANT GUICHAN WU, WEN YU, ZHIQIANG YU, TAO YU DEMURRER to COMPLAINT Hearing Required. By no later than 8:30 a.m. on November 12, 2020 Plaintiff to file a supplemental brief addressing the following: on what date where the defendants supposed to vacate the premises? The date of expiration of the notice? Some other date?, etc. The brief shall be limited to statement of the date only. No argument shall be included. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. RICKY UPTERGROVE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Settlement Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Jul 24, 2020 line 5. PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY'S Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Settlement Agreement is GRANTED. Plaintiff submitted admissible competent evidence support the claim of breach of settlement agreement. No evidence submitted by Defendant. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ALTIUS ENTERPRISES LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY VS. JUAN GILBERTO ESCOBAR MARTINEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Jul 24, 2020 line 6. DEFENDANTS JUAN ESCOBAR MARTINEZ, ROSARIO ESCOBAR'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is GRANTED. Defendant to file Answer by noon on November 12, 2020. Defendant's counsel to remit $2,585 to Plaintiff's counsel no later than December 1, 2020. = (501/CFH)
